dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your AI-powered digital marketing

empty.heroSubtitle: Set up your AI in three quick steps and start converting leads today.
empty.step1Desc: Define the AI's goal, the channel and the tone.
empty.step2Desc: WhatsApp, email or SMS — pick where the AI will talk.
empty.step3Desc: Upload the ad so the AI understands what was promised to the lead.

goalHero.emptyTitle: Set up your funnel to get started
goalHero.emptyDesc: Pick the AI's goal in the sales funnel and track here the percentage of leads that reach it.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: Monitor your AI conversations with leads
conversations.noConversationsDescription: Conversations will appear when leads arrive
conversations.selectConversationDesc: Choose a conversation to monitor the AI

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Register your marketing campaigns so the AI can contextualize each lead
campaigns.noCampaignsDescription: Register your first campaign so the AI understands your leads' context.
campaigns.newCampaignDesc: Register a campaign for the AI to contextualize support
campaigns.targetCountriesDesc: Which countries is this campaign running in? This defines the AI's language.
campaigns.aiLanguageLabel: Which language will the AI speak in this campaign?
campaigns.aiLanguageHint: By default, the AI speaks the language of the selected country. Use this only if you want to force another language (e.g. running ads in the US to capture Portuguese-speaking leads).
campaigns.campaignContentDesc: Upload the campaign material. The AI will analyze and understand what is being promised to the lead.
campaigns.captionPlaceholder: Paste the ad caption or copy if available...
campaigns.textPlaceholder: Paste the ad copy, script, text here...

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: All leads captured from your campaigns
leads.noLeadsDesc: Leads will appear when they arrive from your campaigns

welcome.title: Welcome, {name}!
welcome.subtitle: In just a few minutes your AI will be ready to work your leads. Let's set up the essentials together.

origin.title: Lead origin
origin.desc: Tell us how your leads reach you.

persona.title: AI persona
persona.desc: Pick a profile that speaks like your business.

template.title: Where do your leads come from?
template.subtitle: Choose the scenario that best describes how you capture them. You can change it later in the Funnel.

goal.title: What's the AI's goal?
goal.subtitle: What should the AI do once the lead is qualified?

channel.title: Which channel will the AI use?
channel.subtitle: Pick the primary channel the AI uses to talk to leads.

persona.title: Bring your AI to life
persona.subtitle: Pick a ready-made persona and tweak the name if you want. You can edit everything later in AI Assistant.
persona.businessNamePlaceholder: How you want the AI to introduce itself

sofia.pitch: Warm and professional — perfect for closing deals naturally.

marcos.pitch: Consultative tone, gets the lead's pain and offers technical solutions.

julia.pitch: Welcoming — perfect for sensitive niches like health and wellness.

gabriel.pitch: Energetic and direct, fully focused on booking the meeting.

ana.pitch: Short and objective replies — ideal for high volume.

done.title: All set
done.subtitle: Your AI is ready to work. Let's register your campaigns so it understands what you're selling.

campaigns.title: Register your campaigns
campaigns.desc: Upload your ad creatives. The AI studies them to understand what was promised to the lead.

channels.title: Connect your channels
channels.desc: Plug in WhatsApp, Email or SMS so the AI can start talking.

pipeline.title: Sales Funnel
pipeline.subtitle: Configure the path the AI will follow with each lead
pipeline.selectTemplateFirst: Select where your lead comes from

step1.title: Where does your lead come from?
step1.desc: Select the scenario that best fits your business

step2.title: What's the AI's goal?
step2.desc: What should the AI do when it qualifies the lead?

step3.title: When does the AI make first contact?
step3.desc: Wait time after the lead arrives before the AI sends the first message

formProactive.title: Form / Landing Page
formProactive.desc: Lead fills a form and waits. The AI sends the first message automatically.

whatsappReactive.title: Direct WhatsApp
whatsappReactive.desc: Lead clicks the ad button and goes straight to WhatsApp. The AI responds when the lead messages.

quizProactive.title: External Quiz
quizProactive.desc: Lead fills a Typeform, Google Forms or quiz. Data arrives via webhook and the AI initiates contact.

socialReactive.title: Social Media / DM
socialReactive.desc: Lead sends a message via Instagram, Facebook or other social media. The AI responds automatically.

emailNurture.title: Landing Page + Follow-up
emailNurture.desc: Lead signs up on the landing page. The AI follows up via email and/or WhatsApp to nurture and convert.

manualOutbound.title: Manual List / Referral
manualOutbound.desc: Leads imported manually or by referral. The AI makes first contact via WhatsApp or SMS.

closeSale.title: Close the Sale
closeSale.desc: The AI handles the entire negotiation and closes the sale directly, sending payment link or instructions.

scheduleMeeting.title: Schedule a Meeting
scheduleMeeting.desc: The AI qualifies the lead and schedules a meeting with your sales team (human closer).

qualifyTransfer.title: Qualify and Transfer
qualifyTransfer.desc: The AI asks initial questions, qualifies the lead and transfers to a human agent to continue.

collectSend.title: Collect Data and Send Proposal
collectSend.desc: The AI collects lead information and sends a personalized proposal or informational material.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.followUpDesc: The AI automatically follows up if the lead doesn't respond
advanced.humanApprovalDesc: Requires human approval before the AI closes the sale or schedules

step4.title: Which channel will the AI use?
step4.desc: Select how the AI will communicate with leads

step5transfer.title: Transfer to human
step5transfer.desc: Configure who the AI should transfer qualified leads to
step5transfer.messagePlaceholder: I'll connect you with our specialist now...

step5calendar.title: Meeting scheduling
step5calendar.desc: The AI will check availability and schedule meetings automatically
step5calendar.hint: The AI will check this calendar to find available slots and create events.

webhook.title: Configure lead intake
webhook.desc: Configure your lead source to send data to this URL
webhook.saveFirst: Save the funnel first to generate the URL
webhook.typeform: In Typeform: Go to Connect → Webhooks → paste the URL above. Name, email and phone fields are detected automatically.
webhook.googleForms: In Google Forms: Use Google Apps Script or Zapier/Make to send data via POST to the URL above when a response is submitted.
webhook.formLP: In your landing page form: Configure the form action to send a JSON POST with name, email and phone fields to the URL above.
webhook.lpFollowup: Configure your landing page to send signup data via POST to the URL above. The AI will follow up via email and/or WhatsApp.
webhook.metaDesc: Native integration coming soon. In the meantime, set up your Meta form to send leads via Zapier, Make or another webhook pointing to the URL above.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.subtitle: Connect your WhatsApp so the AI can serve your leads
whatsapp.aiReady: The AI is ready to serve your leads via WhatsApp
whatsapp.disconnectConfirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect WhatsApp?
whatsapp.scanInstructions: Open WhatsApp on your phone → Menu (⋮) → Linked devices → Link a device
whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: Connect your WhatsApp so the AI can send and receive messages from your leads automatically.
whatsapp.preparingDesc: Creating instance and generating QR Code
whatsapp.secureConnectionDesc: Your connection is encrypted and secure. No messages are stored outside the system.
whatsapp.autoReplyDesc: Once connected, the AI starts serving your leads automatically via WhatsApp.
whatsapp.useNormallyDesc: You can continue using your WhatsApp normally. The AI works in parallel.

email.title: Email
email.subtitle: Email sending via Resend
email.resendConfigDesc: The AI will use Resend to send emails to leads
email.helpText: Create a Resend account and verify your domain. The AI will use this channel for automatic follow-up via email.
email.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

sms.title: SMS
sms.subtitle: SMS sending via Twilio
sms.twilioConfigDesc: The AI will use Twilio to send and receive SMS from leads
sms.helpText: Create a Twilio account and buy a number. The AI will use this channel for automatic SMS follow-up.
sms.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields

aiConfig.title: AI Assistant
aiConfig.subtitle: Choose an assistant and provide your company information
aiConfig.chooseAssistantDesc: Each one comes trained with advanced sales techniques. Select what fits your business.
aiConfig.aboutCompanyDesc: Fill in the fields or click "Fill by voice" to dictate everything at once.
aiConfig.aboutCompanyRecording: Say the company name, what it does, products, differentials and target audience. The AI fills everything automatically.
aiConfig.differentialsPlaceholder: What sets you apart? Guarantees, results...
aiConfig.fillCompanyName: Please fill in at least the company name

closer.name: The Closer
closer.desc: SPIN Selling, mental triggers and closing techniques. Converts leads into customers naturally.

consultivo.name: The Consultant
consultivo.desc: Deep consultative approach. Understands the lead's scenario before suggesting anything.

empatico.name: The Nurturer
empatico.desc: Creates deep emotional connection. Makes the lead feel heard before anything else.

agendador.name: The Scheduler
agendador.desc: Qualifies fast and schedules meetings with the human closer. Doesn't sell — ensures the right lead reaches the team.

rapido.name: The Quick One
rapido.desc: Fast and objective responses. No fluff. The lead knows what they want — give the info and the link.
rapido.bestFor: E-commerce, digital products, low ticket, promotions

settings.title: Account
settings.subtitle: Manage your company, team and security
settings.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
